# Estalara

> Estalara is a B2B SaaS platform for real estate agencies that enables live property streaming to international buyers, AI-powered multilingual chat, and purchase-intent lead scoring. Built by Time2Show, Inc. (Delaware, USA).
> 
> Estalara helps real estate agencies replace portal dependency with their own branded channel: AI generates ads, agents go LIVE from properties, and the platform scores which viewers are ready to buy.

## Core Product

- [Homepage](https://estalara.com/)
- [Features](https://estalara.com/#features)
- [How It Works](https://estalara.com/#solution)
- [AI Intelligence](https://estalara.com/#ai)
- [Book a Demo](https://estalara.com/book-demo)
